item.title: HYPERICIN
item.description:
DrugBank ID: db13014
DrugCentral: hypericin
Synonymous :hipericina | hypericin | hypéricine | hypericum red | hyperizin


Drug Sentece Context


Table 1. Analysis of context sentence of hypericin gene in 5 abstracts.

pmid sentence
32340562 To validate the docking interactions, 100 ns molecular dynamics (MD) simulations on the five top-ranked inhibitors including hypericin, cyanidin 3-glucoside, baicalin, glabridin, and α-ketoamide-11r are performed.
32835083 Among them, there were three common compounds including berbamine, hypericin, and hesperidin, which were more effective and appropriate to prevent the COVID-19 infection.
32897178 The compounds theaflavin-3-3’-digallate, rutin, hypericin, robustaflavone, and (-)-solenolide A with respective binding energy of -12.41 (Ki = 794.96 pM); -11.33 (Ki = 4.98 nM); -11.17 (Ki = 6.54 nM); -10.92 (Ki = 9.85 nM); and -10.82 kcal/mol (Ki = 11.88 nM) were ranked top as Coronavirus Disease - 2019 (COVID-19) Mpro inhibitors.
32923004 The calculated binding free energies of Saquinavir, Hypericin, Baicalein and Bromocriptine for the N-terminus of the homology model were -37.2711±3.2160, -30.1746±3.1914, -23.8953±4.4800, -34.1350±4.3683 kcal/mol, respectively, while the calculated binding free energies were -60.2757±4.7708, -30.9955±2.9975, -46.3099±3.5689, -59.8104±3.5389 respectively when binding to the C-terminus. […] Thus, the compounds including Saquinavir, Hypericin, Baicalein and Bromocriptine, could bind the N-terminus and C-terminus of the homology model of the SARS-CoV-2 Nsp14, providing as a candidate drug against SARS-CoV-2 for further study.
